definition: A standard dependent-origination link expressed as a conditional relation.
notes: Use this record when the dependent-arising link is named compactly as upadana-paccaya rather than quoted as the full upadanapaccaya-bhavo line. Keep the relation aligned with the repository's stable condition-language and prefer the dedicated full-line formula record when the canonical line itself is present.

example_phrases.translation: with taking personally as condition, becoming

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for the compact named upadana-paccaya link inside the dependent-arising family; prefer the dedicated upadanapaccaya-bhavo formula record when the whole line is present.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not paraphrase the relation into loose cause-language or treat this short compound record as the preferred target when the governed full-line formula record already fits the passage.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the link from drifting away from stable condition-language in the dependent-arising family.
